/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/dash.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dash.dir/src/gauge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dash.dir/src/common.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dash.dir/src/PID.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dash.dir/src/rcan.cpp.o -o binaries/dash  _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-graphics.a _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-window.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXrandr.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXcursor.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXrender.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXfixes.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXi.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXext.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libX11.so _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-system.a -lrt /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libudev.so -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfreetype.so
